arts.ttl: Stoke City appoint Mark Robins as new manager and ex-Cardiff City coach as assistant
arts.sum: Stoke City have confirmed the appointment of former Coventry City manager Mark Robins as their new boss on a three-and-a-half-year contract

arts.ttl: Stoke appoint ex-Coventry boss Robins as manager
arts.sum: Stoke City appoint former Coventry boss Mark Robins as their new manager on a three-and-a-half-year deal.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Stoke City confirm appointment of new manager
arts.sum: He replaces Narcis Pelach and be joined by a new coaches Paul Nevin and James Rowberry, taking charge for the first time when Stoke host Plymouth Argyle at the bet365 Stadium on Saturday (12.30pm). The club's sporting director, Jon Walters, said: “We are delighted to welcome Mark, Paul and James to the Stoke City family.

arts.sum: Burnley are now able to start their transfer business as the January window has officially opened.

arts.ttl: Burnley v Stoke City: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets look to kick 2025 off with a bang
arts.sum: Burnley will be looking to start the New Year on a positive note when they welcome Stoke City to Turf Moor.

arts.ttl: What the data showed as Ryan Shawcross put quick stamp on Stoke City
arts.sum: If it was to be a consistent high tempo with lots of sprints you would see an upturn in injuries because of the exposure to it but as a long-term vision Joel has to be massively involved in training plans and pre-season to make sure you start reducing them. But Shawcross was writing in these pages back when he was coaching for Inter Miami about how he thought the key for Stoke to pull forward in the right direction was a consistent structure that allows a recruitment plan over years rather than window by window.

arts.sum: Burnley’s new recruit Oliver Sonne will face a slight delay before he’s able to make his Clarets debut.

arts.ttl: Burnley sign Peru international Oliver Sonne as Championship club get straight down to business in bid to boost their promotion push
arts.sum: Championship promotion hopefuls Burnley have signed Peru international Oliver Sonne on a four-and-a-half-year deal from Danish Superliga side Silkeborg.
